# ATP

> This is Atp's blog

This file is a curated Markdown map of the site for large language models. Use the links below as canonical entry points for understanding the site, its posts, projects, pages, and related resources.

## Core

- [Home](https://test.0pt.de5.net/) Homepage and primary site entry point.
- [Posts](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts) Blog post index.
- [Projects](https://test.0pt.de5.net/projects) Project showcase index.
- [Links](https://test.0pt.de5.net/links) Friend links and external resources.
- [Tags](https://test.0pt.de5.net/tags) Tag index.
- [Sitemap](https://test.0pt.de5.net/sitemap.xml) XML sitemap for crawlable pages.

## Posts

- [My NixOS NAS🧊 (2)](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/homelab-nixos-nas-2) Documenting my journey of building a personal NAS using NixOS.
- [Sops-nix Quick Start Guide](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/nixos-sops-nix-quick-start-guide) A quick guide to managing encrypted secrets in NixOS using sops-nix.
- [Using SOPS to Encrypt Nix Values](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/nixos-using-sops-to-encrypt-nix-values) How to encrypt sensitive values in your Nix code using SOPS.
- [A770的AI使用体验](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/hardware-a770-test) Testing the Intel Arc A770 for AI: The good, the bad, and the reality of using an Intel GPU for OLLAMA and ComfyUI
- [升级cmcc rax3000m emmc路由器,刷入ImmortWrt24.10.2](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/router-cmcc-rax3000m-update) Upgrading the CMCC RAX3000M eMMC variant and installing ImmortalWrt 24.10.2.
- [My NixOS NAS🧊](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/homelab-nixos-nas) Documenting my journey of building a personal NAS using NixOS.
- [Docker/NixOS使用traefik实现简单反代](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/server-traefik-simple-guide) Easy reverse proxy setup with Traefik on Docker and NixOS.
- [使用tebi作为s3,搭建nix缓存服务器](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/server-use-tebi-build-nixos-cache-server) A step-by-step guide on how to set up a high-performance Nix binary cache server using TEBI as an S3-compatible storage backend. Learn how to speed up your Nix builds and reduce bandwidth costs by self-hosting your cache.
- [k3s部署rancher](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/k3s-develop-rancher) A quick guide to deploying Rancher on k3s.
- [k3s部署kubevirt-manager](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/k3s-kubevirt-manager) A quick guide to deploying kubevirt-manager on k3s.
- [cloudfront配置服务器cdn并使用acme.sh自动获取证书](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/server-cloudfront-cdn-acme) Configuring CloudFront CDN with automatic SSL certificates via acme.sh
- [搭建泰拉瑞亚Tshock服务器(强制开荒)](https://test.0pt.de5.net/posts/server-build-terraria-tshock) Setting up a TShock server for Terraria with a 'no imported items' rule to ensure a true fresh start.
